title: Blum Blum Shub Pseudorandom Number Generation Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of generating cryptographically secure pseudorandom numbers using the Blum Blum Shub algorithm, a foundation for cryptographic key generation.
elements: Choose seed s coprime to n
Compute initial state x₀ = s² mod n
Update state: xᵢ₊₁ = xᵢ² mod n
relationships: Primes are inputs to compute modulus
Modulus and seed are inputs to compute initial state
Current state is squared modulo n to produce next state
Least significant bit of current state is output as the random bit
